domain: AI-enhanced astrophysical methods for black hole accretion disk radiation transfer and gravitational wave echo detection

subspaces.name: Neural Radiative Transfer Solvers
aliases: 深度学习辐射转移求解器
subspaces.description: Use of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), surrogate models, and differentiable rendering to replace or accelerate Monte Carlo and ray-tracing radiative transfer simulations in accretion disk environments.
subspaces.probe_query: radiative transfer neural surrogate differentiable rendering accretion disk radiation PINN astrophysics

subspaces.name: Gravitational Wave Echo Detection with Deep Learning
subspaces.description: Application of CNNs, transformers, and anomaly detection models to identify weak, delayed gravitational wave echoes in LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA data as probes of quantum black hole structure.
subspaces.probe_query: gravitational wave echoes deep learning detection LIGO noise subtraction quantum hair signatures time-delayed waveform classification

subspaces.name: Differentiable General Relativistic Magnetohydrodynamics
aliases: 可微广义相对论磁流体动力学
subspaces.description: End-to-end differentiable GRMHD frameworks enabling gradient-based optimization of disk parameters via synthetic observables (e.g., image spectra, light curves) using AI-aided adjoint methods.
subspaces.probe_query: differentiable GRMHD adjoint astrophysics gradient-based inference EHT modeling synthetic observables

subspaces.name: Bayesian Inference with Neural Emulators for Disk Spectra
subspaces.description: Integration of fast neural emulators with nested sampling or Hamiltonian Monte Carlo to infer physical parameters (e.g., spin, inclination, electron temperature) from multi-wavelength accretion disk spectra.
subspaces.probe_query: Bayesian spectral inference neural emulator multi-wavelength SED black hole spin measurement nested sampling

subspaces.name: Echo-Informed Spacetime Reconstruction
subspaces.description: Reconstruction of near-horizon spacetime geometry (e.g., firewall, wormhole throat, or ECO potentials) from echo timing, amplitude, and frequency modulation using inverse modeling and symbolic regression.
subspaces.parent: Gravitational Wave Echo Detection with Deep Learning
subspaces.probe_query: spacetime reconstruction echo dispersion relation near-horizon geometry exotic compact object inverse scattering

subspaces.name: Physics-Guided Generative Modeling of Disk Variability
subspaces.description: Generative models (VAEs, diffusion, GANs) trained under physical constraints (e.g., causality, conservation laws, Kerr geodesics) to synthesize realistic stochastic variability from turbulent accretion disks.
subspaces.probe_query: accretion disk variability physics-guided generation light-curve synthesis turbulent disk modeling causal generative models

subspaces.name: Multi-Messenger Joint Inference Frameworks
subspaces.description: AI-driven statistical frameworks that jointly analyze gravitational wave echoes and electromagnetic signatures (e.g., X-ray reverberation, VLBI images) to break degeneracies in black hole and disk physics.
subspaces.probe_query: multi-messenger inference joint GW–EM likelihood cross-modal alignment reverberation mapping EHT–LIGO correlation

subspaces.name: Symbolic Regression for Radiation Closure Relations
subspaces.description: Use of genetic programming and neural-symbolic methods to discover interpretable, physically consistent closure relations for radiative transfer in optically thick, magnetized disk plasmas.
subspaces.probe_query: symbolic regression radiation closure interpretable AI plasma opacity modeling neural-symbolic discovery

subspaces.name: Adversarial Robustness in Echo Classification
subspaces.description: Development of certified robustness, domain adaptation, and uncertainty-aware classifiers to ensure echo detection reliability against waveform mismodeling, glitch contamination, and detector calibration errors.
subspaces.parent: Gravitational Wave Echo Detection with Deep Learning
subspaces.probe_query: adversarial robustness calibration error mitigation out-of-distribution detection Bayesian deep learning GW classifier uncertainty

subspaces.name: Quantum-Inspired Neural Architectures for Spacetime Signatures
subspaces.description: Architectures inspired by AdS/CFT, tensor networks, or quantum information principles (e.g., MPS-based encoders) to extract non-local, entanglement-sensitive features from echo and disk emission data.
seed_papers: Lin et al. 2023, Phys. Rev. D 108, 026004
subspaces.probe_query: holographic ML tensor network classifiers AdS/CFT machine learning entanglement signature detection quantum-inspired inference

subspaces.name: Real-Time Embedded AI for On-Board Echo Triggering
subspaces.description: Ultra-low-latency, hardware-optimized AI models deployed on observatory edge systems for real-time echo candidate identification during live data acquisition.
subspaces.parent: Gravitational Wave Echo Detection with Deep Learning
subspaces.probe_query: real-time GW analysis edge AI low-latency inference FPGA-accelerated ML online echo triggering

subspaces.name: Causal Discovery in Multi-Scale Disk–Echo Coupling
subspaces.description: Application of constraint-based and neural causal discovery methods to infer directionality and latency between accretion disk variability (e.g., X-ray flares) and gravitational wave echo trains in theoretical or simulated multi-messenger data.
subspaces.probe_query: causal discovery temporal coupling disk–echo causality structural time-series modeling Granger–neural hybrid

user_interaction.question: Select the subspaces to prioritize before ZhiZhi imports papers. You can also add custom subspaces.

options.label: Neural Radiative Transfer Solvers
options.description: Use of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), surrogate models, and differentiable rendering to replace or accelerate Monte Carlo and ray-tracing radiative transfer simulations in accretion disk environments.

options.label: Gravitational Wave Echo Detection with Deep Learning
options.description: Application of CNNs, transformers, and anomaly detection models to identify weak, delayed gravitational wave echoes in LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA data as probes of quantum black hole structure.

options.label: Differentiable General Relativistic Magnetohydrodynamics
options.description: End-to-end differentiable GRMHD frameworks enabling gradient-based optimization of disk parameters via synthetic observables (e.g., image spectra, light curves) using AI-aided adjoint methods.

options.label: Bayesian Inference with Neural Emulators for Disk Spectra
options.description: Integration of fast neural emulators with nested sampling or Hamiltonian Monte Carlo to infer physical parameters (e.g., spin, inclination, electron temperature) from multi-wavelength accretion disk spectra.

options.label: Echo-Informed Spacetime Reconstruction
options.description: Reconstruction of near-horizon spacetime geometry (e.g., firewall, wormhole throat, or ECO potentials) from echo timing, amplitude, and frequency modulation using inverse modeling and symbolic regression.

options.label: Physics-Guided Generative Modeling of Disk Variability
options.description: Generative models (VAEs, diffusion, GANs) trained under physical constraints (e.g., causality, conservation laws, Kerr geodesics) to synthesize realistic stochastic variability from turbulent accretion disks.

options.label: Multi-Messenger Joint Inference Frameworks
options.description: AI-driven statistical frameworks that jointly analyze gravitational wave echoes and electromagnetic signatures (e.g., X-ray reverberation, VLBI images) to break degeneracies in black hole and disk physics.

options.label: Symbolic Regression for Radiation Closure Relations
options.description: Use of genetic programming and neural-symbolic methods to discover interpretable, physically consistent closure relations for radiative transfer in optically thick, magnetized disk plasmas.

options.label: Adversarial Robustness in Echo Classification
options.description: Development of certified robustness, domain adaptation, and uncertainty-aware classifiers to ensure echo detection reliability against waveform mismodeling, glitch contamination, and detector calibration errors.

options.label: Quantum-Inspired Neural Architectures for Spacetime Signatures
options.description: Architectures inspired by AdS/CFT, tensor networks, or quantum information principles (e.g., MPS-based encoders) to extract non-local, entanglement-sensitive features from echo and disk emission data.

options.label: Real-Time Embedded AI for On-Board Echo Triggering
options.description: Ultra-low-latency, hardware-optimized AI models deployed on observatory edge systems for real-time echo candidate identification during live data acquisition.

options.label: Causal Discovery in Multi-Scale Disk–Echo Coupling
options.description: Application of constraint-based and neural causal discovery methods to infer directionality and latency between accretion disk variability (e.g., X-ray flares) and gravitational wave echo trains in theoretical or simulated multi-messenger data.

custom_subspace_input.placeholder: e.g. Demand Response; EV Charging Coordination; Building Energy Management
custom_subspace_input.instructions: If your target subfield is not listed, provide one subspace per line or semicolon-separated. These will be converted into custom retrieval branches.

user_interaction.continue_with: Pass subspace_map_id plus selected_subfields, or pass option labels as focus_branches to run_zhizhi_literature_analysis.
